summary.headline: Bunge reports first quarter 2025 results with adjusted EPS of $1.81 vs $3.04 in the prior year
summary.narrative_summary: Bunge reported Q1 2025 financial results, showing a decline in GAAP diluted EPS to $1.48 from $1.68 and an adjusted EPS of $1.81 from $3.04. The company also announced agreements to divest regional corn milling and margarine businesses.

drivers: Processing, though down from last year
segment_commentary.quoted_metric: $270 Segment EBIT vs $278 in the prior year

drivers: A more balanced supply and demand environment, particularly in the U.S.
segment_commentary.quoted_metric: $123 Segment EBIT vs $226 in the prior year

drivers: Slightly higher results in North America were more than offset by lower results in South America where milling margins were pressured by a more competitive pricing environment.
segment_commentary.quoted_metric: $15 Segment EBIT vs $28 in the prior year

drivers: Lower corporate expenses primarily due to performance-based compensation.
segment_commentary.quoted_metric: $-76 Corporate EBIT vs $-104 in the prior year

drivers: Slightly lower than previous outlook and down from last year primarily due to lower results in Processing.
Expected to be similar to the previous outlook and down from the prior year primarily driven by a more balanced supply and demand environment in North America.
Expected to be similar to the previous outlook and up from last year.
Expected to be more favorable than the previous outlook and the prior year.
